name: Windows Credential Manager Access via vaultcmd or cmdkey
description: Detects Windows Credential Manager access via vaultcmd, cmdkey, SharpDPAPI vault extraction, and Mimikatz vault::cred. Covers enumeration and DPAPI-based credential extraction.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name == "vaultcmd.exe" and process.args : ("*listcreds*", "*list*")) or (process.name == "cmdkey.exe" and process.args : "/list") or process.args : ("*SharpDPAPI*", "*vault::cred*", "*dpapi::cred*") or process.args : ("*Microsoft\\Credentials*", "*Microsoft\\Vault*", "*Microsoft\\Protect*"))
